title: tamala humilis
intro: Tamala humilis, also known as Indian bay leaf or bay leaf tree, is a small evergreen tree native to the Himalayan region. It has been traditionally used in Ayurvedic medicine for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory, antibacterial, and antifungal properties. The health benefits of Tamala humilis include its ability to aid in digestion, reduce fever, and alleviate symptoms of respiratory infections. Tamala humilis can be prepared into various herbal preparations, such as teas, infusions, and decoctions, which are often used to support overall health and well-being.
